message.content:
```plantuml
@startuml

participant "App" as App
participant "OperateStructure" as OS
participant "OperateNodeA" as ONA
participant "OperateNodeB" as ONB
participant "VisitorA" as VA

App -[dashed]-> OS : new新建
OS -[dashed]-> ONA : 调用OperateNode中的accept(Visitor)方法
OS -[dashed]-> ONB : 调用OperateNode中的accept(Visitor)方法
ONA -[dashed]-> VA : 调用Visitor中的visit(OperateNodeA)方法
VA --> ONA : 调用OperateNode中的attendance()方法,返回结果
ONB -[dashed]-> VA : 调用Visitor中的visit(OperateNodeB)方法
VA --> App

@enduml
```
